Definition: Size and shape of the procoracoid cartilages, CR= curved, reduced
Size and shape of the clavicles, CR= curved, reduced
Presence (+) or absence (-) of the omasternum
Qualitative description of the call type
The ratio of finger pad width to toe pad width
Cartilaginous or ligamentous connection between scapula and procoracoid
Relative length of 5th toe compared to length of 3rd toe (5<3, 5=3, 5>3)
Toe webbing assessed on 5th toe (absent (-), basally webbed, well webbed)
Tympanum diameter relative to eye diameter (¼, ⅓, or ½)
Whether two horizontal palatal folds in front of the pharynx are present
